title: Mo' Recipes
description: A minecraft mod that adds more recipes!
body:
Adds recipes such as horse armor and enchanted gold apples to minecraft.
Some of the recipes require the create mod and mekanism to work, so if you use them, you will get a few more recipes.
Every recipe in the mod is listed in the gallery.



- If create mod is not installed, please ignore the coal alloy and dirty diamond.
- If mekanism is not installed, please ignore the rusty redstone dust.
 

 

Any other website containing this mod is fake and may be a scam. This mod will only be uploaded to modrinth for the forseeable future.

This mod will only recieve support for forge. Please do not ask for fabric or quilt support.

If you want to modify this mod, you need permission from GeorgeGaming, however you can add it to a modpack without asking.
